title: pleomele smithii
intro: Pleomele smithii, commonly known as the Hawaiian ti plant or mountain ti, is a type of flowering plant in the asparagus family, Asparagaceae. The health benefits of Pleomele smithii include its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and improve immune function. The therapeutic actions of this plant include its antimicrobial, antifungal, and antiviral properties, making it useful in the treatment of various infections and diseases. The bioactive constituents of Pleomele smithii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
